text.title: Core VUI Design Principles Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when applying core-vui-design-principles; each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Assistant reads a 4-item list in one breath; user remembers only the last item.
antipattern.root-cause: Designer copied visual list directly to voice.
antipattern.fix: Single primary idea + `Want details on any of these?` branch.

antipattern.symptom: User says 'stop' but assistant continues; users lose trust.
antipattern.root-cause: Barge-in disabled in runtime config or middleware.
antipattern.fix: Enable barge-in; map stop-words → halt; test on every release.

antipattern.symptom: User asks 'and the next one?' after a list; assistant says 'I don't have context'.
antipattern.root-cause: Context window expired or implicit reset on a non-matching intent.
antipattern.fix: Explicit context window; surface `I forgot what we were discussing — please repeat` rather than implicit reset.
